name: video-clip-pipeline
description: "Long-form video clip pipeline: ingest a long video, identify chapter-worthy segments, output them as standalone clips with metadata. Use when asked to 'chapter this video', 'split into clips', 'long-form to mid-form', 'extract video segments', 'video clip pipeline'."
argument-hint: "Path or URL of the source long-form video"
---

# Video Clip Pipeline (adapter)

Source skill: [`video-clip-pipeline/`](../../../video-clip-pipeline/) — see
[`video-clip-pipeline/SKILL.md`](../../../video-clip-pipeline/SKILL.md).

## When to use

- Webinar / keynote → mid-form YouTube cuts
- Long interview → topic-based chapter clips
- Pre-step before [`short-form-pipeline`](../short-form-pipeline/SKILL.md)
